display_text: Dimensional Doorway, Cost: 0: Tier 5 Neutral item that creates a one-way portal. Teleports you and nearby allied heroes to a target location after a short delay. Primarily used for strategic repositioning or escapes. Stats: CD: 90s, Charges: 3.
